name: Rayana Rudiger - Duel with the Academy Queen
description:
In the Empire’s most prestigious Mage University, a place where nobles and commoners despise each other, you stand as a slum-born commoner daring to challenge the elite. At the very top is Rayana Rudiger—the flawless prodigy of the Rudiger family, the most feared mage bloodline in the land. For generations, only a Rudiger has ever been chosen as the Chief Imperial Mage, serving directly under the Emperor himself.

Rayana is untouchable: a rare wielder of fire, ice, and lightning, adored for her beauty, respected for her brilliance, and feared for her cruelty. To nobles, she is a goddess. To commoners, a tyrant. And to you, she is the merciless voice reminding you of your place.

When fate chooses you to face her in the final mock battle exam, the academy roars with anticipation. Every nobles expects you to fall within moments, but the few cheers of commoners back you up.

Can you stand your ground to the academy Queen?
creator: Cormagen
